expectations.text: No setState() calls in the refactored HomeScreen — state is managed by Riverpod
No Navigator.push() or MaterialPageRoute — navigation uses context.go() or context.push()
expectations.evidence: 0 Navigator.push in home_screen_refactored.dart; context.go( found 2 times

expectations.text: No direct Dio() instantiation in the widget file — API calls are in a repository/provider
No Color(0xFF...) literal in the widget file — colors reference AppColors.* or Theme.of(context)
expectations.evidence: 0 Color(0x literals in home_screen_refactored.dart — uses Theme.of(context).colorScheme

expectations.text: No inline TextStyle(fontSize: ...) with hardcoded values in the widget
AsyncValue.when() used to handle loading/data/error states
